title: Property Consultant - Omkar Realtors - Freshers Welcome

jsonLd.title: Property Consultant - Omkar Realtors - Freshers Welcome
jsonLd.description:
Omkar Realtors, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Property Consultant for our Vadodara operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Omkar Realtors:
Omkar Realtors is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Vadodara, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Omkar Realtors!
